page.title: 项目
page.description: eunomia-bpf 项目体系地图，按 runtime infrastructure、开发工具链、AI agent systems 和公开资源组织。

description.en: A map of the eunomia-bpf project family, grouped by runtime infrastructure, developer tooling, AI agent systems, and public resources.
description.zh: eunomia-bpf 项目体系地图，按 runtime infrastructure、开发工具链、AI agent systems 和公开资源组织。

intro.en: Execution engines, toolchains, runtime components, and low-level extension paths.
intro.zh: 执行引擎、工具链、runtime 组件和底层扩展路径。

intro.en: Tracing, observability, and safety work for AI agent systems.
intro.zh: 面向 AI agent 系统的 tracing、observability 和安全研究。

intro.en: Tutorials, documentation, blog posts, and research papers for eBPF builders.
intro.zh: 面向 eBPF 开发者的教程、文档、博客和研究论文。

description.en: A high-performance userspace eBPF runtime and extension framework for uprobes, USDT, syscall, XDP, GPU, and related workflows.
description.zh: 面向 userspace 的高性能 eBPF runtime 和扩展框架，覆盖 uprobe、USDT、syscall、XDP、GPU 等工作流。

description.en: Extending eBPF programmability and observability to GPUs via dynamic PTX offload — part of bpftime.
description.zh: 通过动态 PTX 注入把 eBPF 的可编程性与可观测性扩展到 GPU，是 bpftime 的一部分。

description.en: Executable eBPF tutorials from hello world to sched-ext, networking, userspace tracing, and GPU scenarios.
description.zh: 从 hello world 到 sched-ext、网络、userspace tracing 和 GPU 场景的可执行 eBPF 教程。

description.en: Curated entry points for runtime documentation, project references, and practical eBPF guides across the site.
description.zh: 汇总 runtime 文档、项目参考和站内实用 eBPF 指南的入口。

description.en: Technical posts on eBPF, userspace runtimes, AI tracing, systems research, and production engineering notes.
description.zh: 关于 eBPF、userspace runtime、AI tracing、系统研究和工程实践的技术文章。

description.en: Research artifacts and paper links covering bpftime, LLM-assisted tracing, AI agent safety, and GPU systems work.
description.zh: 覆盖 bpftime、LLM-assisted tracing、AI agent safety 和 GPU systems 的研究产物与论文入口。

description.en: Build, package, distribute, and run eBPF programs with JSON metadata and WebAssembly OCI workflows.
description.zh: 使用 JSON metadata 和 WebAssembly OCI workflow 构建、打包、分发并运行 eBPF 程序。

description.en: Generate eBPF tracing programs with natural language and use LLMs to explore Linux kernel behavior.
description.zh: 用自然语言生成 eBPF tracing 程序，并借助 LLM 探索 Linux 内核行为。

description.en: Zero-instrumentation LLM and AI agent observability with eBPF, process monitoring, and TLS traffic correlation.
description.zh: 基于 eBPF、进程监控和 TLS traffic correlation 的零插桩 LLM 与 AI agent 可观测性。

description.en: OS-level safety, security, and governance controls for AI agents, with policy-as-code for process trees, files, network effects, data-flow labels, and workflow gates.
description.zh: 面向 AI agent 的 OS-level safety、security 和 governance 控制，用 policy-as-code 约束进程树、文件、网络影响、数据流标签和工作流门禁。

description.en: A userspace eBPF VM with LLVM JIT/AOT support, used as the compiler and execution core of bpftime.
description.zh: 支持 LLVM JIT/AOT 的 userspace eBPF VM，也是 bpftime 的编译和执行核心。

description.en: WebAssembly-based eBPF tooling and runtime support for lightweight sandboxing and cloud native deployment.
description.zh: 基于 WebAssembly 的 eBPF 工具链和运行时支持，适合轻量级沙箱和云原生部署场景。
